mapper.sql: (SELECT s.* FROM fund_score s INNER JOIN ( SELECT fund_id, MAX(score_date) AS max_date FROM fund_score GROUP BY fund_id ) m ON m.fund_id = s.fund_id AND m.max_date = s.score_date)
mapper.select: SELECT c.company_id, c.company_name, c.short_name, c.establish_date, c.asset_scale, c.fund_count, c.manager_count, c.profile, c.source, c.updated_time, COUNT(DISTINCT f.fund_id) AS imported_fund_count, COUNT(DISTINCT m.manager_id) AS imported_manager_count FROM fund_company c LEFT JOIN fund_info f ON f.company_id = c.company_id LEFT JOIN fund_manager m ON m.company_id = c.company_id WHERE c.company_id = #{companyId} GROUP BY c.company_id, c.company_name, c.short_name, c.establish_date, c.asset_scale, c.fund_count, c.manager_count, c.profile, c.source, c.updated_time

SELECT f.fund_id, f.fund_code, f.fund_name, f.fund_type, f.risk_level, f.company_id, c.company_name, f.fund_scale, f.establish_date, s.total_score, s.recommend_level FROM fund_info f LEFT JOIN fund_company c ON c.company_id = f.company_id LEFT JOIN s ON s.fund_id = f.fund_id WHERE f.company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY s.total_score DESC NULLS LAST, f.fund_id DESC
